visual-anti-patterns.notes: Two anti-patterns: some AI suggestion-chip and metadata text appears below 16px equivalent; builder page shows >6 distinct UI groups simultaneously (top bar, category tabs, object grid, 3D canvas, AI header, chat messages, suggestion chips, chat input).

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful emoji-rich UI with friendly AI persona, large CTA buttons, and low text density; the builder's AI panel suggestion chips are slightly small for young children.

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple primary color, pill-shaped buttons, and rounded cards across all pages; minor drift in page backgrounds (solid lavender vs purple-to-mint gradient on the save modal).

visual-accessibility.notes: Good dark-purple-on-white text contrast and text labels on most buttons (Shapes, Explore, Save); however no visible focus rings anywhere, the gallery trash button is icon-only, and no narrow-width/responsive evidence.
